title: SUBSISTENCE ALLOWANCE
doc_html:
CHAPTER 14.  SUBSISTENCE ALLOWANCE

§1051.  State police officials; designation of portion of salary as statutory subsistence allowance

The sum of $5.00 per day of the regular salary of each and every police official employed by the State of Louisiana is hereby designated as a statutory subsistence allowance within the meaning of Section 120 of the United States Internal Revenue Code of 1954.1

Acts 1958, No. 69, §1.

126 U.S.C.A. (I.R.C.1954) §120.
